hooks.command: PLUGIN_ROOT="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-$(ls -d ~/.claude/plugins/cache/aiqrank/aiqrank/*/ 2>/dev/null | sort -V | tail -1 | sed 's:/$::')}"; [ -n "$PLUGIN_ROOT" ] && [ -d "$PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts" ] || exit 0; python3 "$PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/hook_nudge_if_stale.py"

PLUGIN_ROOT="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-$(ls -d ~/.claude/plugins/cache/aiqrank/aiqrank/*/ 2>/dev/null | sort -V | tail -1 | sed 's:/$::')}"; [ -n "$PLUGIN_ROOT" ] && [ -d "$PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts" ] || exit 0; nohup python3 "$PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/hook_upload_today.py" </dev/null >/dev/null 2>&1 &
